meaning: =Rio de Janeiro; Reusable Information Object,可重用信息对象
examples: I went on a photo shoot to Rio with him.
He went to Rio after the CIA had debriefed him.
They would be leaving for Rio early the next morning.
From Mumbai to Rio to New Orleans, organized tours of poor areas have grown in popularity.
The problem is, there are very few sources of information on the tracks in Rio.
